user.title: Connect EVN eAgent account
user.description: Enter your eAgent (eagent.vn) login credentials and electricity customer code.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to fetch new data from the EVN API (1–24 hours). Default is 3 hours.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to EVN server. Please try again.
error.invalid_customer_code: Customer code not found in this account. Check the code on your electricity bill.

abort.already_configured: This customer code is already configured.
